name: Prometheus
description: Open-source monitoring and alerting toolkit — pull-based metrics collection with PromQL query language, time-series storage, and alerting rules
when_to_use: Collecting and querying application metrics, setting up alerting rules, monitoring infrastructure and service health

install.command: brew install prometheus || curl -sLO https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/releases/latest/download/prometheus-linux-amd64.tar.gz && tar xzf prometheus-*.tar.gz

name: Grafana CLI
description: CLI for Grafana observability platform — manage plugins, data sources, dashboards, and server configuration from the terminal
when_to_use: Managing Grafana plugins and dashboards, automating dashboard provisioning, configuring data sources in CI/CD

install.command: brew install grafana || sudo apt install grafana

name: Jaeger
description: Distributed tracing platform — collects, stores, and visualizes request traces across microservices for latency analysis and root cause debugging
when_to_use: Tracing requests across microservices, identifying latency bottlenecks, debugging distributed system failures

install.command: brew install jaeger || docker run -d -p 16686:16686 -p 4317:4317 jaegertracing/all-in-one:latest

name: OpenTelemetry Collector
description: Vendor-agnostic telemetry pipeline — receives, processes, and exports traces, metrics, and logs to any observability backend
when_to_use: Centralizing telemetry collection, routing traces/metrics/logs to multiple backends, transforming and filtering telemetry data

install.command: brew install open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector/opentelemetry-collector || curl -sLO https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector-releases/releases/latest/download/otelcol_linux_amd64.tar.gz && tar xzf otelcol_*.tar.gz

name: Vector
description: High-performance observability data pipeline — collects, transforms, and routes logs, metrics, and traces with a declarative TOML/YAML config
when_to_use: Log aggregation, metrics routing, replacing Logstash/Fluentd with a faster Rust-based alternative, transforming telemetry data

install.command: brew install vectordotdev/brew/vector || curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.vector.dev | bash
